What is pi?: Pi is a mathematical constant approximately equal to 3.14159.
How many minutes are in an hour?: There are 60 minutes in an hour.
How many seconds are in a minute?: There are 60 seconds in a minute.
How many hours are in a day?: There are 24 hours in a day.
How many days are in a week?: There are 7 days in a week.
How many months are in a year?: There are 12 months in a year.
How many centimeters are in a meter?: There are 100 centimeters in a meter.
How many meters are in a kilometer?: There are 1000 meters in a kilometer.
How many grams are in a kilogram?: There are 1000 grams in a kilogram.
What is an even number?: An even number is divisible by 2 without a remainder.
What is an odd number?: An odd number is not divisible by 2.
What is a fraction?: A fraction represents a part of a whole.
What is a percentage?: A percentage is a number expressed as a fraction of 100.
What is an equation?: An equation is a mathematical statement showing that two expressions are equal.
What is algebra?: Algebra is a branch of mathematics that uses symbols and variables to represent numbers and relationships.
What is geometry?: Geometry is the branch of mathematics that studies shapes, sizes, angles, and space.
What is the value of Pi to two decimal p: The value of Pi to two decimal places is 3.14
How many degrees are in a straight line?: There are 180 degrees in a straight line
What is a polygon with five sides called: A polygon with five sides is called a pentagon
What is a polygon with six sides called?: A polygon with six sides is called a hexagon
What is a polygon with eight sides calle: A polygon with eight sides is called an octagon
